name: Grilled Squid Salad with Black Beans and Mango
recipeIngredient: Olive oil -- to brush on squid
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush squid with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
2. Grill squid for 1 1/2 minutes on each side and cut into 2-inch pieces.
3. While the squid is still warm, toss it with the remaining ingredients and serve on a platter.
Yield: 8 servings
